lead: Craft Codex doesn't replace the teacher. It shows him in real time where every single apprentice stands — and who needs him right now.
needYou: {count, plural, one {# apprentice needs} other {# apprentices need}} you
note: The AI takes over the repetition — the master takes the correction. The patient, endlessly repeated part is the tool's job; that leaves more time for what only a human can do. Learning progress is visible at any time and can be exported for the grant's final report.
